package rulecoverage

func PositiveTableNameOverrideOrScopeLogicDuplicatedAcrossModels() string {
    ruleID := "table_name_override_or_scope_logic_duplicated_across_models"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated table-name or model-scope customization across many model files without a shared convention."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
